node.constraint: Use the shared database connection imported from '@/lib/db' (or relative path) for all database operations instead of creating new Database instances. Create an 'orders' table (columns: id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, totalAmount REAL, itemsCount INTEGER, date TEXT, fullName TEXT, address TEXT) if not exists. Support POST: reads all items in 'cart', calculates total sum, inserts a new order row, clears the 'cart' table, and returns the generated orderId. Support GET: returns all orders history sorted by date descending. Ensure the route is dynamic and not cached by exporting: export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
Form POSTs shipping data to '/api/checkout' and on success redirects to '/orders'

Create a checkout form page at app/checkout/page.tsx (Amazon multi-step styling). Display shipping fields (Full Name, Address, City, Zip). Display cart summary, calculate total, and show a 'Place your order' yellow button.
Fetch orders list from '/api/checkout' on mount

Create an orders history view at app/orders/page.tsx. Display previous orders with order card columns (Order Placed date, Total Cost, Ship To address, Status: Delivered/Shipped mock status). Add a button linking back to '/products' to continue shopping.
